form.sheet:
<group string="Return Credit Handling" col="2" invisible="not is_direct_sales_stop or direct_stop_credit_amount <= 0">
<separator string="Collection Decision" invisible="is_direct_sales_stop and direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount <= 0"/> <group col="2" invisible="is_direct_sales_stop and direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount <= 0">
<group invisible="is_direct_sales_stop and direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount <= 0 and direct_stop_credit_amount > 0">
<div class="alert alert-info mt-3" role="alert" invisible="collection_type != 'full' or (is_direct_sales_stop and direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount <= 0)"> Full payment will save the full remaining due amount as draft settlement entries for confirmation. <div class="alert alert-warning mt-3" role="alert" invisible="collection_type != 'partial' or (is_direct_sales_stop and direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount <= 0)"> Partial payment will save the collected amount as draft settlement entries and keep the remaining balance as promised unpaid amount. <div class="alert alert-warning mt-3" role="alert" invisible="collection_type != 'defer_date' or (is_direct_sales_stop and direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount <= 0)"> Defer to date will save a zero-amount draft settlement with a required due date, promise amount, and note. <div class="alert alert-warning mt-3" role="alert" invisible="collection_type != 'next_visit' or (is_direct_sales_stop and direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount <= 0)"> Carry to next visit will save a zero-amount draft settlement with a required promise date, promise amount, and note. <div class="alert alert-info mt-3" role="alert" invisible="not is_direct_sales_stop or direct_stop_settlement_remaining_amount > 0 or direct_stop_credit_amount <= 0"> No cash collection is required. Choose how to settle the return credit, then save.
